summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 'Simplified Home Mode' with tabbed navigation completed. All 11 tests PASSED. Tab navigation renders correctly with 4 Hebrew tabs (בית, תובנות, מערכת, היסטוריה). Home tab shows: Current State (מצב היום), Next Best Direction (כיוון מומלץ), action input, and 'פעל לפי ההמלצה' button. Clicking follow recommendation prefills action input and shows indicator. Decision result displays after evaluation. Recent history shows with 'הצג הכל' link. Insights tab shows Decision Path Engine. System tab shows Collective Mirror and Collective Field. History tab shows Decision History, Decision Map, Session Library. RTL Hebrew layout maintained across all tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Tab navigation uses data-testid attributes (tab-navigation, tab-home, tab-insights, tab-system, tab-history)
GOOD: HomeNavigationSection has proper data-testid attributes (home-navigation-section, home-action-input, home-follow-recommendation-btn, current-state-summary, recommendation-action)
GOOD: RTL layout with dir='rtl' on tab-navigation and home-navigation-section
GOOD: Recommendation indicator (home-recommendation-indicator) shows when action originates from recommendation
GOOD: Recent history section (recent-history) with 'הצג הכל' link (show-all-history) that navigates to History tab
GOOD: Decision result (decision-result) displays after evaluation with proper value tag colors
GOOD: Tabs properly organized - Home for simplified view, Insights/System/History for advanced sections
seed_data_creation: Created test decisions via UI using action input and 'פעל לפי ההמלצה' button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplified Home Mode feature is fully functional. 4-tab navigation implemented: בית (Home), תובנות (Insights), מערכת (System), היסטוריה (History). Home tab shows simplified view with Current State analysis, Next Best Direction recommendation, and action input. All advanced sections moved to appropriate tabs. Key data-testids: tab-navigation, tab-home/insights/system/history, home-navigation-section, home-action-input, home-follow-recommendation-btn, home-recommendation-indicator, current-state-summary, recommendation-action, decision-result, recent-history, show-all-history.

feature_tests.test: Tab navigation renders with 4 tabs: בית, תובנות, מערכת, היסטוריה
Home tab shows current state summary (מצב היום)
Home tab shows next best direction (כיוון מומלץ) with action suggestion
Home tab has action input and 'פעל לפי ההמלצה' button
Clicking Follow Recommendation prefills action input and shows indicator
Decision result shows after evaluation on Home tab
Recent history shows 3 latest decisions with 'הצג הכל' link
Insights tab shows Chain Insights, Weekly Report, Monthly Progress sections
System tab shows Collective Layer, Collective Mirror, Calibration sections
History tab shows Decision History, Decision Map, Session Library
RTL Hebrew layout maintained across all tabs

tab_navigation.data_testid: tab-navigation with tab-home, tab-insights, tab-system, tab-history

home_tab.current_state: מצב היום - analyzes recent decisions pattern (positive/negative/neutral)
home_tab.recommendation_indicator: data-testid='home-recommendation-indicator' - shows when action originated from recommendation
home_tab.recent_history: data-testid='recent-history' - shows 3 latest decisions with 'הצג הכל' link
